documentation_impact.rationale: Phase 3 step 4 implements the memory + I/O surface: @tesseract/memory (FileMemoryStore, MemoryRouter, dual-anchor citation methods), @tesseract/inbox (FileInbox), and @tesseract/notifier (Console + Inbox notifiers). Adjusts the meta package re-exports so the workspace typechecks under the renamed observability symbols, and closes the three feature task lists.

deferred_items.rationale: CitationVerification 'moved' state requires hash-based relocation search; deferred to a later slice with the contract-runner integration.
Vector memory and Mem0/Letta-style features are explicitly out of MVP scope; tracked in the feature task list.
Slack and MCP elicitation transports are deferred per PRD MVP scope and tracked in the feature task list.
LLM-judge README contracts use TBD-on-commit content hashes and require the runner panel; deferred to the contract runner pass.

policy_alignment.agents_md_alignment: Slice stages diffs locally, preserves the human gate at the phase boundary, and respects the no-horizontal-primitive-deps rule (only @tesseract/core dependencies).
policy_alignment.constitution_alignment: Slice keeps governance and citation artifacts traceable while limiting scope to the declared package boundary.
policy_alignment.prd_alignment: Slice satisfies PRD §11 src/memory/src/inbox/notifier responsibilities and aligns with §4 dual-anchor citation expectations and §8 retrieval expectations.
